pcr: PCR 2019:14 Construction Products v1.3.4 (2021-02-05); C-PCR-003 Concrete and Concrete Elements (EN 16757) v2019-12-20
lca_tool: SimaPro® LCA software (v9.4.0.1 per LCA methodology section, p17; v9.5 per Environmental performance results intro, p29 — versions inconsistent in source)
scope: Cradle to gate (A1-A3) with options, modules A4-A5, C1-C4, D declared per module table (Table 3, p18); only A1-A3 and A4 results are actually provided in this document
notes: Product stage reported combined only (A1-A3 GWP-total = 143.83 kg CO2e, Table 8 p32); source gives no A1/A2/A3 split despite marking them declared → A1/A2/A3 = 'incl'.

Module scope table (Table 3, p18) marks A5, C1, C2, C3, C4 and D as declared ('X'), but no corresponding results tables exist anywhere in this 40-page document — table numbering jumps from Table 11 (p33, 'Additional Environmental Impact of Product Stage A1-A3') directly to Table 13 (p34, Distribution stage A4), skipping 'Table 12' entirely, which most likely would have held end-of-life (C1-C4/D) and/or A5 data. Recorded as 'ND' here since no numeric values could be sourced, despite nominally being in scope. p37 ('Interpretation of results') only instructs readers to add A4 to A1-A3, reinforcing that A5/C/D were never actually computed for this specific mix report.

Declared-unit mass (mass_kg) is not reported anywhere in the source — the 'Content declaration' chapter (p22-26) contains no material composition, density, or mass table for this or any mix (unlike other EPDs in this corpus). Recorded as null.

LCA software version is inconsistent in the source: 'SimaPro® LCA software (v 9.4.0.1)' per the Databases and LCA software section (p17), vs 'SimaPro v9.5' per the Environmental performance results intro (p29).

Mix code 'SN252F100' is paired in the results tables (Tables 8-11, p32-33) with product-group label 'Futurecrete Normal Class GL:Slag 25 MPa' (an EvoCem/Type-GL cement + slag lower-carbon Futurecrete mix, categorised as 'Normal Class'). Elsewhere (p27) the document states specific mix codes are assigned to 'special class' mixes — an apparent inconsistency with the 'S' prefix and 'Normal Class' label here. Raw class recorded verbatim; compressive_strength.standard recorded as plain 'AS 1379' (no special/normal-class qualifier) due to this ambiguity.

p7 records this specific document as 'Version No. 1' (13-03-2025) with Summary 'RAA Building Project with Feltrin A & Son', and Table 2 (p16) lists many SA site/cementitious-type/strength combinations assessed under the broader Adbri South Australia LCA study. This suggests the PDF is a project-specific single-mix extract from a larger Adbri EPD family/system rather than a fully generic multi-product public EPD — but this specific declaration (EPD-IES-0021165) reports results for exactly one product (SN252F100), so it is treated as a single product here.

GWP-GHG (144 kg CO2e, Table 11 p33) is marginally higher than GWP-total (143.83 kg CO2e, Table 8 p32) despite GWP-GHG excluding biogenic CO2 (which should make it slightly lower, not higher) — likely a rounding artifact at 3 significant figures rather than a data error.

Provenance span: this EPD reports each life-cycle stage in its own table on its own page. gwp_total.source_page=32 points to the Product-stage A1-A3 table (Table 8 — the comparable 143.83 figure); A4=9.64 is on p34 (Table 13, Distribution stage). The block cites the A1-A3 page, so module-level deep-links (A4 especially) would need per-stage pages.
